detail.description: Samad Taylor singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Tim Tawa.
Samad Taylor singles on a line drive to center fielder Tommy Troy.
Samad Taylor singles on a soft line drive to right fielder Eli White. Ty France scores. Jase Bowen scores.
Samad Taylor singles on a bunt ground ball to pitcher Martín Pérez. Fernando Tatis Jr. to 2nd.
Samad Taylor singles on a line drive to center fielder Michael Harris II.
Samad Taylor singles on a line drive to left fielder Mauricio Dubón.
Samad Taylor singles on a ground ball to shortstop Mauricio Dubón. Sung-Mun Song scores. Fernando Tatis Jr. scores. Samad Taylor to 2nd. Throwing error by shortstop Mauricio Dubón.
Samad Taylor singles on a line drive to center fielder Dane Myers. Jase Bowen scores.
Samad Taylor singles on a ground ball to center fielder Dane Myers. Gavin Sheets scores.
Samad Taylor doubles (1) on a line drive to center fielder Blake Dunn. Will Wagner to 3rd.
Samad Taylor singles on a line drive to left fielder JJ Bleday. Xander Bogaerts scores. Jase Bowen scores.
Samad Taylor singles on a line drive to left fielder MJ Melendez.
Samad Taylor singles on a ground ball to center fielder Wyatt Langford.
Samad Taylor singles on a soft bunt ground ball to pitcher MacKenzie Gore.
Samad Taylor singles on a line drive to center fielder Wyatt Langford.
Samad Taylor singles on a line drive to left fielder Ezequiel Duran.
Samad Taylor singles on a line drive to center fielder Wyatt Langford. Fernando Tatis Jr. to 2nd.
Samad Taylor singles on a soft bunt ground ball to pitcher Trevor Rogers.
Samad Taylor singles on a line drive to left fielder Blaze Alexander.
Samad Taylor singles on a fly ball to right fielder Tyler O'Neill. Manny Machado scores. Xander Bogaerts to 3rd. Gavin Sheets to 2nd.
Samad Taylor homers (1) on a fly ball to center field. Xander Bogaerts scores.
Samad Taylor singles on a line drive to center fielder Colton Cowser. Xander Bogaerts to 2nd.
Samad Taylor singles on a ground ball to left fielder Lars Nootbaar.
Cardinals challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Samad Taylor singles on a ground ball to shortstop Masyn Winn, deflected by pitcher Andre Pallante.
Samad Taylor singles on a line drive to right fielder Kyle Tucker.
Samad Taylor triples (1) on a fly ball to right fielder Seiya Suzuki.
